language.title: Choose Your Language
language.subtitle: Pick a language for the app experience

help.tapQuestion: Tap a question to view the answer
help.tipText: You will receive a push notification every time your complaint status changes. Check the Notifications tab regularly.
help.chooseReach: Choose how you would like to reach support
help.supportHours: Support available Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM

statusDesc.pending: Your complaint has been submitted and is awaiting review.
statusDesc.acknowledged: An official has acknowledged your complaint.
statusDesc.inProgress: Work has been initiated to resolve the issue.
statusDesc.workScheduled: A resolution date has been scheduled.
statusDesc.resolved: The issue has been fixed. You can leave feedback.
statusDesc.rejected: The complaint could not be addressed. Check the official note.

submitComplaint.q: How do I submit a complaint?
submitComplaint.a: Tap the plus button at the bottom, select a category, add a photo, description, and location, then submit. AI verifies and forwards your complaint to the right department.

resolveTime.q: How long does it take to resolve a complaint?
resolveTime.a: Most complaints are acknowledged within 24 hours and resolved in 3-7 working days depending on category and priority.

trackStatus.q: How do I track my complaint status?
trackStatus.a: Open the Complaints tab to see all submitted complaints and their latest status updates.

points.q: What are Points and how do I earn them?
points.a: You earn points for reporting complaints, supporting valid issues, and completing civic actions like quizzes and feedback.

anonymous.q: Can I submit a complaint anonymously?
anonymous.a: Yes, you can choose anonymous submission while filing a complaint and still track progress in your account.

rejected.q: What if my complaint is rejected?
rejected.a: Rejected complaints include a reason. You can update details or evidence and submit again.

notifications.a: You get notifications when complaint status changes, including acknowledgement, progress, and resolution.

rateService.q: How do I rate a public service?
rateService.a: Use the Rate Service option on Home, then rate a nearby service location and submit your feedback.

community.subtitle: Support issues that matter to you
community.reachNextLevel: 150 XP to reach Active Citizen level
community.similarIssueText: 2 similar complaints found within 100m radius. Consider supporting existing reports instead of creating duplicates.

quiz.subtitle: Test your civic knowledge and earn points
quiz.streakRule: Get 3+ in a row for bonus XP
quiz.messageGreat: Great job. You are doing well!
quiz.messagePractice: Keep practicing. You will improve quickly!
